ProductRange.title: Our Product Range
ProductRange.desc: Comprehensive canopy solutions for every architectural need

horizontal.title: Horizontal Beam Style
horizontal.desc: The Horizontal Beam Style canopy features a classic cross-beam structure with a clean, modern appearance. It offers strong support and is ideal for balconies, windows, and entrances.

suspended.title: Suspended Cable Style
suspended.desc: The Suspended Cable Style uses a sleek steel cable system to hold the canopy overhead, creating a lightweight and elegant design. This space-saving solution is especially suited for window awnings.

top_beam.title: Top Beam Style
top_beam.desc: The Top Beam Style canopy is supported by beams at the top, offering excellent stability and full coverage. This structure is commonly used for villa entrances, terraces, or large window areas.

column.title: Column Support Style
column.desc: The Column Support Style features vertical columns in front and back for maximum load-bearing capacity. This canopy covers a wide area, making it ideal for terraces, storefronts, and residential carports.

inner_corner.title: Inner Corner Style
inner_corner.desc: The Inner Corner Style canopy is tailored for inner wall junctions, such as L-shaped balconies or passageways. It provides excellent drainage and extended shelter coverage in tight spaces.

outer_corner.title: Outer Corner Style
outer_corner.desc: The Outer Corner Style is designed to fit around the outer angles of a building, extending the protective area seamlessly. It’s perfect for covering corner balconies, storefronts, or external walkways.

carport.title: Carport Style
carport.desc: The Carport Style canopy is specifically designed to shield vehicles from sun, rain, and debris. Supported by strong posts and topped with durable materials, it offers excellent protection.

door_window.title: Door & Window Awning Style
door_window.desc: This style is specifically designed for installation above doors and windows, providing effective protection from rain and direct sunlight. Compact yet durable, it keeps entryways dry.

Features.title: Product Features
Features.subtitle: Designed to perform under pressure — rain, wind, snow, and impact.

waterproof.title: Waterproof
waterproof.desc: Shields against rain, rust, corrosion, and surface damage — for lasting protection in all weather.

impact.title: Impact Resistant
impact.desc: Built to withstand force and impact from falling debris, ensuring long-term structural integrity.

wind.title: Wind Protection
wind.desc: Stable and secure against strong winds, reducing sway and protecting what’s beneath.

snow.title: Snow Load Resistant
snow.desc: Engineered to bear heavy snow loads without bending or cracking, even in extreme cold.

CustomService.title: Custom Design Services
CustomService.desc: Every project is unique. We provide flexible customization for all components to match your exact specifications.

Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our polycarbonate canopies

questions.q: Can the canopy be customized to fit my space?
questions.a: Yes! We offer full customization in terms of dimensions, colors, panel thickness, and frame styles to fit residential or commercial applications. Just send us your measurements and preferences.

questions.q: Is polycarbonate really stronger than glass?
questions.a: Absolutely. Polycarbonate sheets are up to 200 times stronger than glass and are virtually unbreakable. They are also lighter and safer in harsh weather conditions like hail, wind, and heavy rain.

questions.q: Does the awning block UV rays?
questions.a: Yes, all our awnings come with UV-resistant coatings that block over 99% of harmful UV radiation, protecting your furniture, doors, and windows from sun damage.

Most installations take several hours for a standard-size awning. We provide easy-to-follow instructions and all necessary accessories. For larger or commercial projects, our team offers professional installation support.

questions.q: How durable is the awning in extreme weather?
questions.a: Our polycarbonate awnings are engineered to withstand strong wind loads, heavy rain, and snow. The aluminum alloy brackets and stainless steel fittings ensure long-term durability and corrosion resistance.
We provide a 10-year limited warranty covering material defects, discoloration, and structural performance. Full warranty details are available upon request.

questions.q: Do you offer bulk pricing for distributors or builders?
questions.a: Yes, we offer tiered wholesale pricing and OEM/ODM services for partners, contractors, and distributors. Please contact our sales team for a customized quote.

questions.q: What colors and finishes are available?
questions.a: Our polycarbonate panels come in clear, grey, bronze, and blue tints. Frame colors include matte black, white, silver, and custom RAL options.

Testimonials.title: Client Testimonials
Testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by customers worldwide for quality and service
Testimonials.ariaLabel: Customer reviews and star ratings section

reviews.name: Eric Zhang
reviews.text: The canopy held up perfectly during a sudden heavy rainstorm right after installation. The drainage design is smart, and the aluminum frame feels very solid. Will definitely use PolyCanopy for future projects.

reviews.name: Michael Robertson
reviews.text: The canopy system exceeded our expectations. Strong aluminum structure, clean modern look, and the installation was straightforward. It performed excellently in recent strong winds.

reviews.name: Ahmed Al-Mutairi
reviews.text: Excellent heat resistance and high transparency. The canopy performs well under strong sunlight, and the aluminum frame doesn’t warp or fade. Ideal for the Gulf climate.

reviews.name: Sofia Martínez
reviews.text: We used PolyCanopy for a rooftop café project in Buenos Aires. The materials are top-notch, especially the polycarbonate panel — very clear and durable. Our clients love the result.

reviews.name: Lisa Chen
reviews.text: Excellent material quality – especially the polycarbonate panel. The transparency is high and much safer than glass. Plus, we don’t have to worry about falling objects from upstairs. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Thulani Mokoena
reviews.text: The aluminum frame is robust and lightweight. We also appreciate the gutter system design — very useful during seasonal rains. It looks great on commercial buildings too.
